rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.172, which governs the housing department's acquisition and use of money and depositories.
quote:
The department may:
(1) acquire, hold, invest, deposit, use, and spend its income and money from every source; and
(2) select its depository or depositories
_note: No conflict; rule concerns departmental financial operations unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
